oai_dc:dc.dc:title: Using practice management software to add value to your large animal practice
oai_dc:dc.dc:creator: Mowrer, Em
oai_dc:dc.dc:subject: practice management software
records
inventory management
oai_dc:dc.dc:description: Practice management software systems are available for vet­erinarians to enhance their practices by streamlining schedul­ing, billing, inventory management and record keeping. There are multiple systems available to meet client needs. Some sys­tems are cloud-based, while others are server-based. Practices should work with software companies to choose which system best fits their needs. This article addresses some questions to ask while looking into systems, as well as the most common tasks that systems perform for veterinarians.
oai_dc:dc.dc:source: American Association of Bovine Practitioners Conference Proceedings; Vol. 58 No. 2 (2025): 2025 AABP Annual Conference Proceedings; 158-159
oai_dc:dc.dc:rights: Copyright (c) 2026 American Association of Bovine Practitioners
